title: Голос із туману
description: Повернення в Хейзмур після Злиття. Тіло героя гниє. Печатка мовчить. Ілія шепоче в голові. Туман хоче, щоб він заснув назавжди.

hero_state.skin: earthy, cold, fingertips blackened with peat
hero_state.breath: wheezing, metallic taste of blood and mint
hero_state.first_seal: dampens Mour whispers, dries mud in radius
hero_state.bolo_weaving: manipulate bog emanations — costs stamina, causes pain

ilia_anchor.nature: voice in hero's head only, invisible to others
ilia_anchor.function: warns of madness, reminds of name, guides through fog
ilia_anchor.isolation: she stayed in Valkorn to stabilize Wardens

return_to_mist.mechanic: dense fog, no minimap, sanity drain, seductive whispers
return_to_mist.breakthrough: grab Ilia's voice — sanity restored, path revealed with Warden stakes

scarred_path.obstacle: black root-webs, peat chasms, poison gas
scarred_path.bolo_weaving_use: touch roots to make them part — costs stamina, Ilia begs him to stop
